hero.headline: Something extraordinary for your finances is coming.
hero.subheadline: Globin is the smartest personal finance platform built for the US, Europe, and Latin America. Real bank sync. Smart budgets. AI-powered insights. Total control — in one app.

beta.title: Join the Beta.
beta.subtitle: Be among the first 500 users to try Globin before the official launch. Free access. Early features. Your feedback shapes the product.

field.name: Full name
field.usecase: What will you use Globin for?
field.referral: How did you hear about us? (optional)

beta.disclaimer: No spam. No credit card. Unsubscribe anytime.
beta.success: You're in! We'll contact you before launch. Spot #XXX secured.

features.title: Everything you need to master your money.
features.subtitle: Globin is not just another budget tracker. It's a complete personal finance platform — built for real life.

card1.title: Real Bank Sync
card1.description: Connect your accounts from major banks in the US, Europe, and Latin America. Transactions imported automatically, in real time.

card2.title: Smart Budgets
card2.description: Set spending limits by category. Get alerts before you overspend. Always know where your money goes.

card3.title: Savings Goals
card3.description: Set a goal — vacation, emergency fund, new car — and track your progress automatically every month.

card4.title: Multi-Currency
card4.description: Manage accounts in USD, EUR, COP, BRL and more. Automatic conversion. Reports in your preferred currency.

card5.title: Shared Payments
card5.description: Split expenses with friends or family. Track who owes what and settle up easily — no awkward conversations.

card6.title: Family Plan
card6.description: Manage your whole family's finances from one app. Individual and shared visibility. Custom permissions per member.

card7.title: AI-Powered Categorization
card7.description: Globin automatically categorizes your transactions using AI. Less manual work. More accuracy.

card8.title: Reports & Dashboard
card8.description: Monthly reports, spending charts, category breakdowns, and month-over-month comparisons. Know your financial story.

card9.title: Automation Rules
card9.description: Set rules to auto-categorize, tag, or alert on any transaction. Globin works in the background so you don't have to.

step1.title: Connect your bank
step1.description: Link your accounts securely. Globin never stores your banking credentials.

step2.title: Globin organizes everything
step2.description: Transactions are automatically categorized, tagged, and matched to your budgets.

step3.title: You take control
step3.description: Track goals, review reports, and make smarter financial decisions — every single day.

us.label: United States
us.banks: Chase, Bank of America, Wells Fargo, Citi, and more

eu.label: Europe
eu.banks: Revolut, N26, BBVA, Santander, Monzo, and more

latam.label: Latin America
latam.banks: Bancolombia, Davivienda, Nequi, Nubank, Itaú, and more

item1.title: AES-256 Encryption
item1.description: Bank-grade encryption on all your data, always.

item2.title: Zero Credential Storage
item2.description: We never store your banking login. Ever.

item3.title: Open Banking Compliant
item3.description: Built to the highest regulatory standards across all three regions.

item4.title: Read-Only Access
item4.description: Globin can see your transactions but can never move your money.

finalcta.headline: Ready to take control of your finances?
finalcta.subtext: Join the waitlist. Get beta access. Be part of building Globin.
finalcta.disclaimer: Free during beta · No credit card · 500 spots available
